overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a bustling futuristic city sidewalk next to a red construction wall, then turning around and walking back to stop near a bench where two people are sitting. The scene features a mix of modern glass skyscrapers and traditional architecture, holographic billboards, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic under clear sunny skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk next to construction site

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past various pedestrians, with a red construction wall on the left and busy traffic on the right

notable_agents.action: man in brown jacket walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall red barrier wall running along the left side of the sidewalk
yellow and red signage for a food establishment with cartoon character

tall futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers lining the street
large white billboard advertising coffee with an image of a hand holding a cup

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward along a sunlit city sidewalk bordered by a red construction wall on the left and a busy multi-lane street on the right. Various pedestrians walk past in the opposite direction while cars drive by. Futuristic skyscrapers and holographic billboards rise in the background, with an elevated highway visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with traditional storefront and seating area

events.description: character performs a 180-degree turn and begins walking back in the opposite direction
character stops near a wooden bench where two people are sitting

agents.ego_description: walking back along the sidewalk after turning around, approaching a bench with two seated individuals against a traditional building

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on a bench against the building wall, one holding a glowing device

entered.detail: low-rise wooden structure with traditional architectural elements and signage
simple wooden bench attached to the building wall where people are seated
pink illuminated sign above the traditional building entrance

segments.scene_description: After turning around, the character walks back along the sidewalk with the red construction wall now on the right. A traditional Japanese-style building with a wooden bench comes into view, where two people are seated. The character approaches and stops near the bench, while traffic continues to flow on the street now to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bustling futuristic sidewalk that transitions from a forward trek past urban construction to a return toward a quiet architectural nook. It begins with the character walking forward under a clear sun, flanked by a red construction wall and a multi-lane street filled with flowing traffic and passing pedestrians. As the character turns around, the perspective shifts, placing the red wall on the right while the camera tracks back through the city's mix of holographic billboards and towering skyscrapers. The scene then opens up to reveal a traditional Japanese-style building, shifting the focus from the scale of the metropolis to a more intimate setting. Finally, the camera slows as the character approaches and stops near a wooden bench where two people are seated, with the city traffic continuing to hum in the background.
